title: Add Definition of Done Section to Story Template
overall_result: FAIL - Cannot proceed to QA approval

summary.recommendation: HALT - Fix violations before QA approval

items_affected: Template file updated with DoD section
DoD section appears after Test Strategy section
violations.description: Work has been completed and committed (git 423c271) but story's DoD checklist remains unmarked (0/27 items). Story status shows 'Dev Complete' but DoD tracking shows 0% completion. This is a discrepancy between story status and Definition of Done tracking.

evidence.git_commit: 423c271 - feat(STORY-014): Add Definition of Done section...

violations.root_cause: Implementation completed and committed, but story file's DoD checklist never updated to reflect completion. Story author set status to 'Dev Complete' but left all DoD items unchecked.
remediation: Option A: Mark all 6 implementation items [x] if work is truly complete (RECOMMENDED - work IS done)
Option B: If work not complete, document deferral with justification, blocker, user approval, and follow-up story reference
violations.rca_impact: RCA-006 (Autonomous Deferrals) + RCA-008 (Autonomous Git Operations) - Workflow discrepancy

items_affected: All 7 acceptance criteria have passing tests
E2E test: Future story includes DoD
violations.description: 13 test and quality assurance items deferred without ANY justification, blocker documentation, or user approval. All items simply left unchecked with no explanation. Story has 0% test coverage (0 tests written).
violations.root_cause: Autonomous deferral without justification. No attempt to document why testing was skipped or deferred.
remediation: Option A: Complete testing (Phase 1 Red → Phase 2 Green → Phase 3 Refactor) - brings coverage to 95%+
Option B: Defer testing with proper justification (create ADR + follow-up story + user approval markers with timestamp)
RECOMMENDED: Option A if possible (better quality), Option B if time-constrained
violations.rca_impact: RCA-006 (Autonomous Deferrals Incident) - Direct violation of deferral protocol

items_affected: Template includes comment explaining DoD section
violations.description: 4 documentation items either missing or incomplete. Template has no explanatory comment. Validation script and maintainer guide not updated.

evidence.story_rationale: PARTIAL (Implementation Notes exist but DoD not marked)

violations.root_cause: Secondary deferral items left unmarked during primary implementation.
remediation: Option B: Defer to follow-up story with ADR + user approval
violations.rca_impact: Maintainability concern - framework constraints less clear
violations.note: Secondary to CRITICAL and HIGH violations but still required for QA approval

adrs_missing: ADR for scope change (why testing deferred)

implementation_completion_assessment.conclusion: Work IS complete and committed. The issue is that the story file's DoD checklist was never updated to reflect this completion.

quality_gate_assessment.gate: Quality Gate 3 - QA Approval (devforgeai-qa Phase 0 Step 2.5)
quality_gate_assessment.reason: CRITICAL, HIGH, and MEDIUM violations detected - cannot approve
required_for_approval: CRITICAL: Resolve unmarked implementation (mark items or defer with approval)
HIGH: Resolve testing deferrals (complete or defer with ADR + approval)
MEDIUM: Resolve documentation items (complete or defer with approval)

requirements: Add user approval marker with timestamp
